display_name: the caves · level 1 · the chamber of barrels

w.label: shallow tidepool · the tide is out for now

W.label: a drop-off · the water is deeper than you can see · the tide will fill this in a few hours

l.label: a hurricane lantern in a wall alcove · somebody keeps it lit

g.label: carved into the rock · 'Ana Faustina · 1873' · a ship's name

d.label: scratches on the rock · 'PERDIDA · MARÇO 1873' · lost · March 1873

b.label: an old sea-barrel with faded Portuguese writing on the side · verse two of the shanty

B.label: the barrel · open · inside are a coil of dry rope, a rusted lantern, and a folded oilcloth

P.label: a narrow passage that opens up past the barrel · down and further in

p.label: back out to the north bluff · the sun is bright after the caves

notes: The caves entrance chamber · Sitka spruce-shaped by tidewater · Portuguese ship graffiti on the walls dated 1873 · a hurricane lantern someone keeps lit at each end (Wilson) · a sea-barrel with faded shanty writing that opens if you can read old Portuguese · a narrow passage at the east wall that opens up further past the barrel.  A tidepool at south · when the tide comes in, the pools fill and cover the deep W tiles.
